L_53df881c44.W_2f3cca02: 老師 / 教員 (教員 → giáo viên)

L_91f8bc5baf.S_1a8e70ec: Over 60% of Vietnamese vocabulary is Sino-Vietnamese.
L_91f8bc5baf.S_8c5d7207: These words have identical meaning to Chinese, just different pronunciation.
L_91f8bc5baf.S_9ed304fd: You already know the concepts, you just need the sound patterns.
L_91f8bc5baf.S_c186d2d6: Examples: chính phủ = 政府, tổng thống = 總統.

L_92551a6b2f.S_79cfdb2b: 我媽是老師。 (giáo viên = 教員)
L_92551a6b2f.S_40b849fd: 我爸當工程師。 (kỹ sư = 技師)
L_92551a6b2f.S_1808cc63: 我想當醫生。 (bác sĩ = 博士)
L_92551a6b2f.S_d56e896f: 我姐念大學。 (đại học = 大學)

L_05e4e352e6.S_cde09074: 政府公布新政策。(全是 Hán-Việt!)

L_961e2cdcc7.W_0a4c94a3: 英 → anh (e.g. 英雄 → anh hùng)
L_961e2cdcc7.W_48566d96: 京 → kinh (e.g. 北京 → Bắc Kinh)
L_961e2cdcc7.W_9a68256e: 政 → chính (e.g. 政府 → chính phủ)
L_961e2cdcc7.W_34d96e70: 生 → sinh (e.g. 學生 → học sinh)
L_961e2cdcc7.W_80491fda: 情 → tình (e.g. 友情 → tình bạn)

L_3ac5deb58b.W_80c64ff6: 長 → trường (e.g. 長遠 → trường kỳ)
L_3ac5deb58b.W_f8830154: 上 → thượng (e.g. 上海 → Thượng Hải)
L_3ac5deb58b.W_73a27c42: 方 → phương (e.g. 方向 → phương hướng)
L_3ac5deb58b.W_bcdbf578: 想 → tưởng (e.g. 思想 → tư tưởng)

L_6e4b985496.W_6dd888de: 工 → công (e.g. 工人 → công nhân)
L_6e4b985496.W_a9a7f116: 公 → công (e.g. 公司 → công ty)
L_6e4b985496.W_4d01e8fb: 通 → thông (e.g. 交通 → giao thông)

L_3f6c134625.W_1a7bd03d: 新 → tân (e.g. 新年 → Tân niên)
L_3f6c134625.W_d8d6a47e: 先 → tiên (e.g. 祖先 → tổ tiên)
L_3f6c134625.W_29dfbb96: 心 → tâm (e.g. 中心 → trung tâm)
L_3f6c134625.W_b24227a8: 學 → học (e.g. 學校 → học hiệu)

L_a0b9c7d57c.W_95363fc6: 中 → trung (e.g. 中國 → Trung Quốc)
L_a0b9c7d57c.W_3e7c30fc: 正 → chính (e.g. 正式 → chính thức)
L_a0b9c7d57c.W_dcb8152f: 主 → chủ (e.g. 主題 → chủ đề)
L_a0b9c7d57c.W_854f53e2: 真 → chân (e.g. 真實 → chân thực)

L_723b3db187.W_d751c516: house/home = 家 — NOT from Chinese (but 家庭 gia đình IS)
L_723b3db187.S_6c0c0220: Home words tend to be pure Vietnamese.
L_723b3db187.S_8bd28847: Abstract/formal words tend to be Sino-Vietnamese.
L_723b3db187.S_c20d6e80: 家 = nhà + gia — both forms exist.

L_9cee972735.S_28817e24: bệnh viện = 病院; đa khoa = 多科.
L_9cee972735.S_b4dfb855: trung tâm = 中心; thương mại = 商業.
L_9cee972735.S_ad9ba547: công viên = 公園; quốc gia = 國家.
L_9cee972735.S_315a4929: học viện = 學院; kinh tế = 經濟.

L_09fcf9a285.W_5333818d: 英文字母 — 與英文發音相近
L_09fcf9a285.W_f7e508e6: 英文字母 — 但 f 在越南語不單獨使用 (用 ph)
L_09fcf9a285.W_f1732849: 英文字母 — 與英文相近
L_09fcf9a285.W_8bbf330b: 越南語中不存在這些字母

L_4ae84a56d3.W_3b23bd24: 短 a (比 a 更短促)
L_4ae84a56d3.W_d68da903: 短「呃」(類似台語「兒」的母音)
L_4ae84a56d3.W_c861dd7a: 中元音「呃」(介於 ơ 和 â 之間)
L_4ae84a56d3.W_94477b4c: 英文 d 的發音 (不加一橫的 d 是「Z/Y」)

L_59266c2146.W_cf8f696f: (沒符號) 平聲 (類似注音一聲)
L_59266c2146.W_f49a4c50: (hook) 降升聲 (類似注音三聲一部分)
L_59266c2146.W_202e3044: (tilde) 高而緊的聲 (台語「走」的調)
L_59266c2146.W_96a6201c: (dot) 重降短促聲 (類似注音四聲但更短)
L_59266c2146.S_9ff18d52: 相同字母不同聲調 = 不同意思!

L_56c3137c40.W_0d27407c: 華語有 4 個聲調 (一二三四)
L_56c3137c40.W_92681277: 越南語有 6 個聲調 (平、下降、上升、降升、緊高、重降)
L_56c3137c40.S_69524262: Heritage learners often mix up tones.

L_cf9fa23a18.W_5dbd66f8: 北部類似英文 tr,南部類似 ch
L_cf9fa23a18.W_4aa5d70b: 送氣的 t (類似英文 top 的 t)

L_8089c715f1.W_5dab5e52: 阮 — 最常見的越南姓 (讀: 「nwin」)

L_269e558e40.S_5109fca3: 醫院 (Sino-Viet! bệnh viện = 病院)

L_b45cf0a42c.W_9deca034: 降升調 — 華語沒有的聲調
L_b45cf0a42c.W_a7a137ec: 降升調 — 非常常見的音
L_b45cf0a42c.S_439baa81: This tone 'first drops then rises' — no direct Mandarin equivalent.
L_b45cf0a42c.S_0e266566: Compare to Mandarin 3rd tone, but Vietnamese hỏi is more pronounced.

L_8914d97b4f.W_fb90edac: 聲帶緊繃的高升調 — 華語完全沒有
L_8914d97b4f.W_c80d2407: 緊喉調 — 台灣學生最常唸錯的聲調
L_8914d97b4f.S_97ab0d7c: This tone has a 'glottal catch' — a slight squeeze.
L_8914d97b4f.S_af88b734: Taiwanese learners often mis-pronounce mã as má — different meanings!

L_390c1828d3.W_0d5965a7: 在越南語是兩個完全不同的字
L_390c1828d3.W_0d85f73a: đ 與 gi 也要分清
L_390c1828d3.S_6aa89de8: Vietnamese has đ, d, gi — three separate letters.

L_110e95e8b9.W_e706a378: 短 a — 比 an 短促
L_110e95e8b9.W_1c1ff772: 短「呃」— 完全不同的音
L_110e95e8b9.W_981e9cc0: 三個都不一樣,意思也完全不同
L_110e95e8b9.S_02362f25: Mandarin ㄢ is longer — learners often overpronounce ăn.
L_110e95e8b9.S_b830f15f: Practice: bàn vs bận vs bận.

L_c1614ab982.S_8d99a315: If you know Taiwanese Hokkien (which has p/t/k finals), it's easier!
L_c1614ab982.S_2a752298: Practice: bác vs bát — different endings.

L_949964f4e6.W_64f0a051: 媽媽家鄉的腔調 — 可能跟標準不同
L_949964f4e6.W_d562a6db: 通常指河內腔 (或南部的胡志明市腔)
L_949964f4e6.W_30be6386: 概念類似:都是華語,但有差異
L_949964f4e6.S_4cb2c592: What you hear at home may differ from news pronunciation.
L_949964f4e6.S_1ebff9cf: Both are real Vietnamese; standard is better for formal contexts.
L_949964f4e6.S_ce4f93a9: Like Taiwanese know the difference between Taiwan Mandarin and PRC Mandarin.

L_97f5cf4fd2.S_a1e56893: 我在台灣學,所以發音有點不同。

L_ad17599f50.S_7ab74193: 我想把越南語學得更標準。

L_1fa74bd25e.W_0ceb7c99: 兩個詞雖然發音接近,但意思不同
L_1fa74bd25e.S_ef74cbf5: Northern dialect merges d/gi/r into Z.
L_1fa74bd25e.S_ca58aa39: Southern dialect: d/gi = Y, r stays r.
L_1fa74bd25e.S_c79e94b7: At home you may mix these based on your mom's accent.

L_fa76b1f24a.W_5f3d75d5: 從媽媽 / 外婆那邊來的腔
L_fa76b1f24a.W_3a4be669: 新住民母親多半來自南部 / 中部

L_fa76b1f24a.S_a57f2b17: Most 新住民 moms are from south or central Vietnam.
L_fa76b1f24a.S_c0778851: Southern accent softer, d/gi = Y sound.
L_fa76b1f24a.S_ec7b8254: Do you know where your mom is from? You can ask.

L_e5b22a619b.W_e98e7ef5: 南/北腔都可,讓別人聽得懂
L_e5b22a619b.W_fb405981: 書面語通常是北部標準
L_e5b22a619b.S_3d9c77c6: Speaking to mom, use home accent — fine.
L_e5b22a619b.S_8446d82d: If you'll use Vietnamese at work, learn the standard.
L_e5b22a619b.S_0af580c5: Vietnamese TV news is mostly Northern standard.

L_5511704253.W_7357f257: 華語只有 4 聲,越南有 6 聲
L_5511704253.W_75536828: 新住民子女常把這兩個搞混
L_5511704253.W_7904468c: 聽說讀寫都能幫助辨認
L_5511704253.S_e198134a: Listen to how mom pronounces — very helpful.
L_5511704253.S_52d17769: Can also learn from Vietnamese YouTubers.

L_66dc7bd0ac.S_1e98d6ed: 「媽買了三件衣服」— 量詞必加。
L_66dc7bd0ac.S_9bdaa246: Vietnamese classifiers are stricter than Chinese.
L_66dc7bd0ac.S_33b13f94: Classifier concept is familiar — just stricter.

L_866b71cc4c.S_c4eea7c0: Good news: you won't make English-speakers' mistakes.

L_9fef4a3e58.W_f04194ce: 華語:「她是漂亮的」(可以) vs 越南:不用 là
L_9fef4a3e58.S_eb7785e0: Don't use là with adjectives in Vietnamese.
L_9fef4a3e58.S_d8526cf5: Chinese allows 'she is pretty' with 的; Vietnamese doesn't with là.
L_9fef4a3e58.S_1432bdb0: Mandarin 很 → Vietnamese rất / lắm, no là.

L_931762e018.S_929aff13: Can combine: Tôi đã ăn cơm rồi.
L_931762e018.S_ea1c4064: For Mandarin speakers, rồi placement is intuitive — similar to 了.

L_d768421c71.S_290c5962: Don't translate word-for-word; some orders differ.

L_495a2ddff7.S_8043019c: 媽媽得學中文,適應新文化。
L_495a2ddff7.S_e6c1c4d6: 但她為家人保留越南文化。

L_1e6229a4c1.S_b9be4e94: 台灣也有粽子,但有點不一樣。
L_1e6229a4c1.S_b8dd3112: 越南粽子方的,台灣粽子三角形。

L_605f638fc8.S_261e7d3d: 我有兩種文化:台灣和越南。
L_605f638fc8.S_a0822497: 過年我吃越南年糕和台灣肉粽。
L_605f638fc8.S_a8880767: 我家吃河粉也吃牛肉麵。
L_605f638fc8.S_2688e263: 我覺得很幸運同時擁有兩種文化。

L_b675498891.S_6261c3fc: 我有兩種文化:台灣和越南。
